concerns.text: FR-009 requires calculating 'Object Detection Recall against ground-truth bounding boxes' to validate visual fidelity. Task T011 only implements YOLO detection and fallback logging. No task exists to compute the Recall metric (TP/(TP+FN)) against the ground truth provided in the dataset, leaving FR-009 and SC-005 unimplemented.

SC-005 requires a composite metric measuring '(1) Relative improvement in accuracy... AND (2) Object Detection Recall'. While T020 calculates accuracy and T023 (if implemented) would calculate recall, no task exists to compute the 'Relative improvement' metric or combine these into the single composite score required by SC-005.

SC-004 requires retrieval latency to be measured 'against the baseline latency of the Coarse strategy'. Tasks T018 and T031 implement recording raw latency per strategy, but no task exists to compute the relative baseline comparison (e.g., (Latency_Fine - Latency_Coarse) / Latency_Coarse) or flag deviations as required by the success criterion.

FR-003 mandates a retrieval pipeline using a 'multimodal embedding space (fusing text captions and bounding box coordinates)'. Task T015 explicitly implements 'retrieval logic using cosine similarity on object captions' only, and the Plan (Phase 1) confirms coordinates are 'excluded from similarity calculation'. No task exists to implement the fusion of coordinates into the embedding space as mandated by FR-003.

The Spec Assumptions state 'The top-k retrieval parameter is fixed at k=5'. No task explicitly implements a configuration or hard-coding of `k=5` for the retrieval logic in T014/T015, leaving the parameter value implicit and potentially variable across runs, which risks reproducibility (Constitution Principle I).
